title: Financial Analyst
description: Lockheed Martin seeks a Financial Analyst to support cost analysis, budget tracking, and financial forecasting for our Space Operations division in Denver. You will analyze contract spending patterns, monitor project budgets against actual expenditures, and develop financial models to support strategic decision-making. This role requires strong analytical skills and the ability to navigate complex defense procurement environments.
responsibilities: Conduct cost analysis on space systems contracts using earned value management principles
Develop monthly budget variance reports and present findings to program management
Build financial models to forecast project costs and identify risk exposures
Analyze historical spending data to improve future cost estimation accuracy
Maintain compliance with Defense Contract Audit Agency (DCAA) financial standards
Support strategic initiatives to optimize operational efficiency and reduce unit costs

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field

benefits: Health insurance with medical, dental, vision, and mental health coverage
Lockheed Martin 401(k) plan with company match
On-site wellness center and subsidized fitness programs
